persona.name: Carlos Silva
persona.lifestyle: High-income business consultant, luxury traveler, executive-level expectations

health_concerns: Hypertension (elevated after Tokyo incident - increased medication)
Stress-related cardiac incidents (2 major episodes requiring emergency care)
High-stress lifestyle with addiction risk (post-surgery pain management history)

current_success: Recent Tokyo emergency fully covered (€8,500 reimbursement) - second stress incident
Partner-level benefits available (€5,580 annual savings opportunity with better coverage)
High-value asset protection needs (€170,000 valuables vs €100,000 current coverage limit)
Family transitions requiring coverage updates (Isabella 18, Lucas 20 - adult coverage needs)
